title: July 2025 Transaction Data
body: "Please note this data shows what HM Land Registry has been able to process during the time period covered and is not necessarily a reflection of market activity.  In July:     HM Land Registry completed over 2,052,580 applications to change or query the Land Register  the South East topped the table of regional applications with 461,467   HM Land Registry completed 2,052,588 applications in July compared with 1,883,560 in June 2025 and 2,092,554 last July 2024, of which:    313,380 were applications for register updates compared with 269,147 in June 1,184,040 were applications for an official copy of a register compared with 1,089,639 in June 218,523 were search and hold queries (official searches) compared with 208,276 in June 94,452 were transactions for value compared with 75,499 in June 15,530 were postal applications from non-account holders compared with 13,831 in June   Applications by region and country      Region/country May applications June applications July applications     South East 412,654 422,048 461,467   Greater London 342,449 349,946 381,098   North West 207,014 214,047 233,844   South West 174,774 181,091 198,510   West Midlands 153,174 161,477 174,925   Yorkshire and the Humber 144,125 151,505 163,555   East Midlands 133,949 141,668 153,087   North 90,354 94,997 106,620   East Anglia 77,428 80,777 87,041   Isles of Scilly 71 56 60   Wales 81,787 85,841 92,257   England and Wales (not assigned) 132 107 124   Total 1,817,911 1,883,560 2,052,588     Top 5 local authority areas   July 2025 applications     Top 5 local  authority areas July applications     Birmingham 30,348   City of Westminster 26,485   Leeds 22,879   North Yorkshire 22,758   Somerset 21,463     Top 5 customers   July 2025 applications     Top 5 customers July applications     Infotrack Limited 232,939   Enact 38,391   O’Neill Patient 34,085   Orbital Witness Limited 33,627   Landmark Information Group Ltd 32,549     Access the full dataset on our Use land and property data service.  Next publication   Transaction Data is published on the 15th working day of each month. The August 2025 data will be published at 11am on Friday 19 September 2025. "
